ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_name" TEXT /* Name of the video file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video file in MB */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the video file */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate of the video */,
  "codec" TEXT /* Codec used for video compression */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the video was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the video was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rois" (
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the ROI belongs to */,
  "roi_name" TEXT /* Name of the ROI */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the ROI in the video frame (e.g., 'x1,y1,x2,y2') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ROI */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the ROI (e.g., #RRGGBB) */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the ROI (e.g., rectangle, circle, polygon) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the ROI in pixels */,
  "rotation" REAL /* Rotation of the ROI in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rois_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_slices" (
  "slice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video slice */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the slice belongs to */,
  "slice_start" INTEGER /* Start time of the slice in seconds */,
  "slice_end" INTEGER /* End time of the slice in seconds */,
  "slice_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the slice in seconds */,
  "keyframe" INTEGER /* Whether this slice is a keyframe */,
  "segment_type" TEXT /* Type of segment (e.g., I-frame, P-frame, B-frame) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_slices_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roi_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the metric belongs to */,
  "slice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video slice the metric belongs to */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI the metric belongs to */,
  "L1" REAL /* Metric L1 (e.g., color intensity) */,
  "L2" REAL /* Metric L2 (e.g., motion vector) */,
  "L3" REAL /* Metric L3 (e.g., object detection score) */,
  "L4" REAL /* Metric L4 (e.g., edge detection) */,
  "L5" REAL /* Metric L5 (e.g., texture analysis) */,
  "L6" REAL /* Metric L6 (e.g., brightness level) */,
  "L7" REAL /* Metric L7 (e.g., contrast ratio) */,
  "L8" REAL /* Metric L8 (e.g., saturation) */,
  "L9" REAL /* Metric L9 (e.g., sharpness) */,
  "L10" REAL /* Metric L10 (e.g., noise level) */,
  "L11" REAL /* Metric L11 (e.g., blur score) */,
  "L12" REAL /* Metric L12 (e.g., color temperature) */,
  "L13" REAL /* Metric L13 (e.g., hue distribution) */,
  "L14" REAL /* Metric L14 (e.g., chroma variance) */,
  "L15" REAL /* Metric L15 (e.g., luminance) */,
  "L16" REAL /* Metric L16 (e.g., chromatic dispersion) */,
  "L17" REAL /* Metric L17 (e.g., color gradient) */,
  "L18" REAL /* Metric L18 (e.g., color correlation) */,
  "L19" REAL /* Metric L19 (e.g., color homogeneity) */,
  "L20" REAL /* Metric L20 (e.g., color consistency) */,
  "L21" REAL /* Metric L21 (e.g., color balance) */,
  "L22" REAL /* Metric L22 (e.g., color contrast) */,
  "L23" REAL /* Metric L23 (e.g., color harmony) */,
  "L24" REAL /* Metric L24 (e.g., color saturation) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_metrics_slice_id FOREIGN KEY ("slice_id") REFERENCES video_slices ("slice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_metrics_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_metrics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_videos" (
  "project_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-video association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the video in the project (e.g., main, reference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_videos_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_videos_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the video */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video version */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_versions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roi_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI version */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the ROI */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the ROI version was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roi_versions_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being annotated */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI being annotated (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being tagged */,
  "roi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROI being tagged (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_roi_id FOREIGN KEY ("roi_id") REFERENCES rois ("roi_id")
)
